absorption: Potential BID absorption at 61300.0, where a large stacked bid wall (2128 lots) is absorbing aggressive selling pressure shown by negative delta.
dom_observation: Very large stacked bid wall at 61300.0 (2128 lots) acting as support. Significant ask liquidity sits at 61400.0 and 61500.0.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC'nin hemen altinda buyuk bir pasif alim duvarini (61300.0) test ediyor ve negatif deltaya ragmen dususu durakliyor, bu da potansiyel bir BID absorption ve yukari yonlu bir donus sinyalidir.
